home.lede: Discovery & verification controller rau §§ 000§§ peer-to-peer network.
home.fingerprintDesc: Pin tus yuam sij pej xeem no hauv koj tus neeg siv §Vortex. Txhua qhov lus teb los ntawm tus tswj hwm tau kos npe nrog nws - qhov tsis sib haum xeeb txhais tau tias ib tus neeg tab tom cuam tshuam.
home.step1: Nruab §§ 000§§ ntawm koj lub cuab yeej.
home.step2: Xaiv Global§ network hom hauv kev teeb tsa wizard.
home.step3: Muab tshuaj txhuam tus tswj URL (Nws pib daws teeb meem ntawm SNS) lossis qhov URL nkag los ntawm qhov chaw no.
home.step4: Xyuas kom tseeb tias §§ 000§§ hauv koj lub app phim cov ntiv tes saum toj no.
home.step5: Koj txuas nrog. Txhua yam ntxiv (node ​​list, kos npe) yog ua tiav.
home.nodesDesc: Txhua tus phooj ywg sau npe, lawv qhov hnyav, qhov kawg, thiab cov ntaub ntawv pov thawj.
home.entriesDesc: Bootstrap URLs rau cov neeg siv khoom thawj zaug - Cloudflare tunnels, Tor, IPFS, ncaj qha.
home.mirrorsDesc: Lwm tus tswv tsev ua haujlwm rau tib cov ntsiab lus kos npe no thaum muaj censorship.
home.securityDesc: Kev tawg tag nrho ntawm dab tsi yog cryptographically txheeb xyuas, dab tsi tsis yog, thiab yog vim li cas.

nodes.title: Sau npe nodes
nodes.lede: Txhua tus phooj ywg tus tswj hwm paub txog. Cov neeg siv khoom tau nyeem daim ntawv teev npe no, txheeb xyuas qhov kos npe, thiab xaiv cov node los txuas rau raws li qhov hnyav. Lub kaw lus tshiab tau txais qhov hnyav 1.0; stale los yog unsealed nodes lwj mus rau 0 yog li cov tsheb khiav mus nyob, cov phooj ywg ntseeg xwb.
nodes.legendDualD: Sau npe nrog tus maub los THIAB kaw cov saw ntawm §§ 000§§. Ob tus neeg pov thawj ywj pheej lees paub qhov code hash.
nodes.legendCtrlD: Sau npe nrog §§ 000§§ maub los. Kev kos npe ua pov thawj tias cov node muaj nws tus kheej tus yuam sij, tab sis kev ncaj ncees ntawm txoj cai tsis yog nyob rau ntawm cov saw hlau.
nodes.legendUnverifD: Paub los ntawm cov ntaub ntawv config lossis lus xaiv. Tseem tsis tau authenticated. Kho nrog ceev faj - leej twg tuaj yeem tshaj tawm pubkey kom txog thaum cov ntaub ntawv pov thawj tuaj txog.

entries.title: Nkag URLs
entries.lede: Pib cov ntsiab lus rau cov neeg siv khoom uas tsis muaj cov phooj ywg tseem. Txhua qhov nkag URL yog ib txoj hauv kev mus cuag tus maub los - los ntawm Cloudflare qhov, Tor, IPFS rooj vag, lossis tus thawj tswj hwm. Luam ib qho rau hauv koj li Vortex app ntawm thawj zaug tso tawm.
entries.typeTunnelD: Dawb *.trycloudflare.com chaw nyob. Tsis xav tau tus account. URL hloov thaum lub qhov rov pib dua - kho raws li ephemeral.
entries.typeTorD: .onion chaw nyob, ncav cuag tsuas yog los ntawm Tor. Censor-pov thawj, qeeb qeeb. Xav tau Tor tus neeg siv khoom lossis tus choj.
entries.typeIpfsD: Cov ntsiab lus-chaw nyob daim ntawv luam ntawm qhov zoo li qub frontend. Pab los ntawm ib qho §IPFS rooj vag - tsis muaj ib tus neeg rau zaub mov los thaiv.
entries.typeDirectD: Regular domain + TLS. Ceev tshaj tab sis thaiv tau ntawm qib §§ 000§§ / IP.
entries.currentTitle: Cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no

mirrors.title: Daim iav qhov chaw
mirrors.lede: Lwm qhov chaw uas ua haujlwm rau tib lub ntsiab lus kos npe raws li qhov chaw no. Pab tau yog tias vortexx.sol raug thaiv ntawm koj li DNS/ISP. Txhua daim iav raug tshuaj xyuas ib ntus - cov xim xim qhia txog qhov kev sojntsuam zaum kawg.
mirrors.healthyD: Tshawb xyuas hauv 5 feeb dhau los thiab teb OK. Muaj kev nyab xeeb siv tam sim no. Latency muaj nyob rau ntawm daim npav.
mirrors.unreachableD: Kev sojntsuam kawg ua tsis tiav - kev sib txuas tsis kam, ncua sijhawm, 5xx. Daim iav yuav poob, thaiv, lossis overloaded. Sim tus tom ntej.
mirrors.noprobeD: Tor .onion mirrors tsis tuaj yeem kuaj xyuas kev noj qab haus huv yam tsis muaj lub zos Tor npe. Cov xwm txheej tsis paub - siv §Tor browser los kuaj.

security.title: Kev ruaj ntseg qauv
security.lede: Raws nraim li cas cryptographically txheeb xyuas, dab tsi tsis yog, thiab yuav ua li cas txhua tus yuam sij hauv qhov system khwv tau - lossis poob - koj qhov kev ntseeg siab. Nyeem qhov no ua ntej koj txuas cov neeg siv khoom tshiab rau tus tswj hwm koj tsis khiav koj tus kheej.
security.treasurySub: Lub hnab nyiaj §Solana tau txais cov nqi them raws tu qauv (sau npe cov nqi los ntawm cov nodes tshiab + txiav 20% ntawm cov nqi them nqi) thiab faib cov seem raws li khoom plig rau cov neeg ua haujlwm nquag. Txhua tus tuaj yeem tshawb xyuas cov kev nkag / tawm ntawm cov saw hlau.
security.treasury1: On-chain transparency - qhov chaw nyob saum toj no yog tus tswv ntawm §vortexx.sol§§§§§§§Solana Lub Npe Kev Pabcuam. Txhua qhov inflow (sau npe nqi, subscriptions) thiab txhua qhov nqi zog them nyiaj yog kos npe rau §Solana kev lag luam - txheeb xyuas tau los ntawm leej twg, suav nrog koj.
security.treasury2: §§ 000§§ Tus Nqi cais§§ 001§§ - 70% ntawm txhua tus nqi them nqi mus rau lub pas dej ua ke khoom plig (distributed pro-rata rau cov nodes los ntawm kev siv + ceg txheem ntseeg), 20% nyiaj txiag kev loj hlob, 10% yog hlawv / tuav pov hwm. Sau npe cov nqi thauj tog rau nkoj ntawm tus kheej thiab tiv thaiv sybil.
security.treasury3: Custody caveat - kom txog thaum cov nyiaj tau txais kev cog lus ntse raug xa mus, cov nyiaj txiag ua haujlwm raws li tus neeg saib xyuas ib ntus. Qhov no yog sau ua ncaj ncees ntawm no thiab taug qab rau pej xeem. Daim ntawv cog lus ntse yuav hloov kev saib xyuas phau ntawv ib zaug tshawb xyuas + ntawm kev tswj hwm thaj av.
security.wrongTitle: 6. Yog ib yam dab tsi tsis zoo
